meta.title: RO Builds Motorsport — Professional drift team
meta.description: Romanian pro drift team, P3 in RoDrift PRO 2026, BMW E46 4.4 V8 Turbo, 600 whp. See the team, the car, partners and shop.

hero.tagline: Professional drift team. P3 in RoDrift PRO 2026.

about.title: Conquering Romanian drift, with passion.
about.body: We're a motorsport-obsessed team entering our fourth season in the Romanian National Drift Championship (RoDrift). Promoted to the PRO class in 2024. P7 in 2025. Fighting for the title in 2026 — currently P3. We hand-build our cars, film the whole process and run Romania's biggest drift YouTube channel.

channel.title: Romania's biggest drift YouTube channel.
channel.body: We film every round, every practice, every garage night. Weekly vlogs, on-board cam, behind the scenes — all backed by a community growing month after month.

reel.title: What a drift run looks like.
reel.body: On-board camera, chasing at the limit — a slice from a RoDrift PRO weekend.

car.title: BMW E46 · 4.4 V8 Turbo
car.body: Hand-built from scratch. BMW M62 4.4 V8 with turbocharger. 600 HP. 800 Nm of torque. One of the most spectacular cars in the championship.

reach.title: RoDrift audience.
reach.body: Aggregate numbers from the 2023 RoDrift season plus live socials. Romanian drifting is growing — and we're growing with it.
reach.caveat: Numbers from the 2023 RoDrift season; socials — live.

community.title: The biggest fan base in the championship.
community.body: Every round, our fans show up by the dozens — all wearing team and sponsor branded shirts. We're not just running a drift team, we're building a community.

support.title: Three ways to back the team.

form230.title: Form 230 (RO taxpayers)
form230.body: Redirect 3.5% of your income tax to Asociația Club Sportiv RBuilds Motorsport. Costs you nothing — means everything to us.

partner.title: Become a partner
partner.body: Want to take your brand into motorsport? Customisable packages for any budget and goal.

shop.title: Team shop
shop.body: T-shirts, caps and parts we developed for the BMW E46. Every order helps fund the season.

contact.title: Get in touch.
contact.body: For partnerships, shop orders or anything about the team.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thanks! We'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Email us directly.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.hero_title: We take your brand into motorsport.
partnerships.hero_body: Customisable packages for any goal — from car livery exposure to dedicated YouTube campaigns. All details available, no public pricing — we talk directly.

car.title: Race car livery
car.body: Your logo on the competition BMW — seen by thousands of spectators at every round and tens of thousands of viewers online.

suit.title: Driver suit branding
suit.body: Your logo on the driver's race suit — visible in every photo session, interview and podium shot.

uniform.title: Team uniform
uniform.body: Five team members at every event, all in the same uniform with your logo. Plus hundreds of fans in branded merch.

social.title: Social campaign
social.body: Weekly content on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok. Video ads, mentions, organic integrations in our vlogs.

paddock.title: Event-day marketing
paddock.body: Banners, flags, promotional materials in the team paddock. Flyer handouts to spectators.

shop.title: Shop
shop.hero_body: Curated products — t-shirts, caps and parts we built for the BMW E46. Orders go through direct contact.
